description: Collection of biblical verses about the triumphs of David, then in Judaeo-Arabic, “the composition (תאלפיה seems to be an error for תאליפה) was completed at the time of his ascendancy/rule over the sects in Nisan 1563 (=1252 CE)." The occasion might have been a political victory of David I Maimonides, but this is hard to prove. Cf. Halper 329.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
